articles.title: City Detect, which uses AI to help cities stay safe and clean, raises $13M Series A
articles.summary: City Detect, a company that helps local governments prevent urban decay, is in at least 17 cities so far, including Dallas and Miami.

articles.title: After Europe, WhatsApp will let rival AI companies offer chatbots in Brazil
articles.summary: Meta is now allowing rival AI companies to provide their chatbots on WhatsApp to Brazilian users for a fee, a day after the company confirmed a similar decision for users in Europe.

articles.title: Anthropic to challenge DOD’s supply-chain label in court
articles.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said he plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the AI firm as a supply-chain risk. He claims most Anthropic customers are unaffected by the label.
